About

Apin Pulse is a fully decentralized, deflationary, community driven meme coin built on the Pulsechain blockchain and operates within the Pulsechain & PulseX ecosystem, offering scarcity, community-driven development, and censorship resistance.

Apin Pulse aims to foster widespread adoption and is driven by the largest and most enthusiastic community in the Crypto space, Pulse chain.

Apin Pulse is launched with no pre-sale and no transaction fees or hidden fees of any kind.

LP keys burnt and contract renounced at launch. Liquidity locked for 369 years

Tokenomics

No Pre-Sale, No Transaction Fees or Hidden Fees of Any Kind

Liquidity Locked For 369 Years

Total Supply 100,000,000,000

50% of the supply sent to the liquidity pool

40% of the supply is destroyed in a public burn

10% of the supply will be held in a multi-sig wallet only to be used for future exchange listings, bridges, and liquidity pools.

LP keys destroyed in a public burn and contract renounced

Wallets can be tracked on scan.pulsechain.com

Parabolic tokenomics

Name

Apin Pulse Coin

Ticker

$APC

Security

The $APC smart contract has been fully audited. The ownership of the contract has been renounced, and the Liquidity Pool tokens have been locked forever.
That means next to zero risk to our users and community from potential bad actors.

Why Apin Pulse?

For years now, we have watched countless promising launches, and most tokenomics are just not sustainable.

Most founders sell their entire supply in a presale, usually called an ICO, IDO, IEO, Sacrifice, etc

There are many names for presales.

What does this mean for you?

This means that the entire supply is sitting in private wallets and not in the liquidity pool, where it belongs. Therefore, liquidity pools cannot support the outside sell pressure.

Liquidity pools are supposed to grow as the value of the token grows, meaning as the money goes in and the supply comes out, the liquidity pool is growing in value.

When people sell or take profits, there is more than enough liquidity in the pool. The price impact, even on large sell orders, should be minimal.

Let’s break it down for you.

In a decentralized locked liquidity pool with no fees like the Apin liquidity pool, there is only one way to acquire the supply, go to app.pulsex.com and swap $PLS for $APC

With most projects, centralized market makers control the price.

With most projects, market makers on centralized exchanges control the price depending on how much is being bought or sold!

The market cap does not reflect the liquidity in the pool.
With $APC the market cap and price are directly correlated to the liquidity in the pool.

Roadmap

Phase 1

  • Premier Launch on PulseX
  • Coinmarketcap & CoinGecko listings
  • Get $APC trending on Social media
  • Get Apin trending on Twitter
  • 1000+ holders

Phase 2

  • Pulsechain Community Partnerships
  • Marketing campaigns with major influencers
  • Search Engine Optimization
  • CEX Listings
  • 10,000+holders
  • APIN merch

Phase 3

  • NFT Platform & NFTs
  • Play 2 Earn game
  • CHIMP token launch on the Ethereum blockchain
  • 25% of the Chimp supply airdropped to $APC token holders & APC NFT holders
  • Announcement of Chimp tokenomics and roadmap

How To Buy

Step 1

Download MetaMask or your preferred wallet from the Google Play or App Store. Alternatively, you can visit metamask.io to get the Google Chrome extension for desktop users.

Step 2

Visit the Pulsechain.com website. Click the ‘Add Pulsechain to MetaMask’ button on their homepage. Click ‘Confirm’ on your MetaMask Wallet to add the Pulsechain network.

Step 3

Get Some $PLS.
If you need to bridge ERC20 tokens into $PLS go to bridge.pulsechain.com
You can bridge any ERC20 tokens directly into $PLS  
Alternatively buy $PLS directly with Fiat here – guardarian.com
Swap your $PLS into $APC on app.pulsex.com
You must have $PLS in your wallet for gas.
